array.string: #! /bin/sh launchctl setenv SSH_ASKPASS "${SSH_ASKPASS:=/usr/local/bin/ssh-askpass}" launchctl setenv SUDO_ASKPASS "${SUDO_ASKPASS:=/usr/local/bin/ssh-askpass}" launchctl setenv DISPLAY "ssh-askpass" rm -f $SSH_AUTH_SOCK SSH_ASKPASS=/usr/local/bin/ssh-askpass DISPLAY='ssh-askpass' /opt/homebrew/bin/ssh-agent -D -a $SSH_AUTH_SOCK
